$comment: Project hooks. The deps-guard PreToolUse hook enforces supply-chain checks deterministically; the slice-audit hook blocks ship commits without a valid docs/ships/ record (enforcement belongs in hooks, not prompts). The static+test quality gate is enforced by the code-reviewer subagent's own Stop hook (see .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md) and by CI.

hooks.statusMessage: Ship audit: checking backlog moves against docs/ships/ records...
